scripts.cq: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.cq:check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.tickets:build: pnpm run tickets:fragment && pnpm run tickets:sync && pnpm run tickets:queue
scripts.ralph:once:codex: RALPH_ENGINE=codex RALPH_AGENT_CMD_TEMPLATE='bash scripts/ralph-agent-runner.sh "{{TASK_PROMPT_FILE}}"' pnpm run ralph:once
scripts.ralph:loop:codex: RALPH_ENGINE=codex RALPH_AGENT_CMD_TEMPLATE='bash scripts/ralph-agent-runner.sh "{{TASK_PROMPT_FILE}}"' pnpm run ralph:loop
scripts.ralph:once:claude: RALPH_ENGINE=claude RALPH_AGENT_CMD_TEMPLATE='bash scripts/ralph-agent-runner.sh "{{TASK_PROMPT_FILE}}"' pnpm run ralph:once
scripts.ralph:loop:claude: RALPH_ENGINE=claude RALPH_AGENT_CMD_TEMPLATE='bash scripts/ralph-agent-runner.sh "{{TASK_PROMPT_FILE}}"' pnpm run ralph:loop
